title: Semantic Loop State
description: Tracks the semantic source-discovery loop across iterations. Stored at .work/semantic-loop/state.json.

iteration.description: Current iteration number. 0 means the loop is initialized but no iteration has run.

status.description: complete requires all verification scores >= 8. partial means max_iterations was reached with gate failures.

repo_fingerprint.description: A stable fingerprint of the analyzed repository state, e.g. the git HEAD commit hash, so artefacts can be tied to a specific source state.

scope.description: Human-readable statement of scope, e.g. 'read-only semantic source discovery'.

weakest_score.description: Name of the lowest-scoring verification dimension from the most recent verification, if any.

next_action.description: The corrective action the next iteration must perform first.
